cohort_plans.purpose: Generate adipocyte-specific Dendra2 mice for mitochondrial transfer experiments
cohort_plans.note: 37.5% of pups from these crosses will be the experimental genotype.

cohort_plans.purpose: Generate triple-reporter mice (mTmG + Adipoq-Cre + Dendra2) for adipocyte mitochondrial transfer with membrane labeling
cohort_plans.note: ~75% of pups from homozygous crosses will be the experimental genotype — highly efficient.

cohort_plans.purpose: Expand Dendra2 colony for backcrossing into other lines
cohort_plans.note: Active Dendra2 breeder pairs — ensure Transnetyx litter records are kept current.
